key_themes: Significant copper drill intercepts and zone expansion at Soo Project
Confirmation of large-scale Cu-Mo porphyry system
Aggressive 25,000m+ 2026 drill program and non-core asset sale
summary: Sterling Metals (TSXV: SAG / SAG.V), a junior copper explorer, is seeing positive sentiment following strong 2025-2026 drill results at its Soo Copper Project in Ontario. Key intercepts such as 235.5m at 0.42% Cu (including higher-grade sections) and the discovery of new bornite-covellite zones have confirmed a district-scale porphyry system, building on prior high-grade hits. The company earned a spot on the 2026 TSX Venture 50 for its 520% share price rise in 2025, recently sold its non-core Sail Pond project to sharpen focus, and has a major drill campaign planned—though the stock has consolidated ~25% in recent weeks amid typical junior miner volatility.[[1]](https://finance.yahoo.com/quote/SAG.V/)[[2]](https://finance.yahoo.com/markets/stocks/articles/sterling-metals-announces-sale-sail-210000415.html)[[3]](https://investingnews.com/sterling-metals-intersects-235-5m-at-0-42-cu-and-0-042-g-t-au-including-32-75m-at-1-31-cu-and-0-11-g-t-au-and-discovers-new-bornite-covellite-zone/)
sources: 8+ company news releases (Feb-Apr 2026), 10-15 relevant X posts from mining investor accounts (Mar-Apr 2026), Yahoo Finance, Junior Mining Network, TradingView, SterlingMetals.ca
